positive: A stylized, vibrant celestial forest scene. The main subject is a cluster of bioluminescent, stylized trees and oversized glowing flora, forming a central, detailed silhouette against a deep twilight sky. The roots and undergrowth should be intricately patterned, suggesting ancient magic. Incorporate glowing geometric patterns and subtle cosmic dust streaking through the scene. Composition should be symmetrical and highly detailed, perfect for a repeating apparel pattern element. Color palette: deep indigo, ethereal teal, glowing lime green, accented with magenta highlights. Style: Modern psychedelic maximalism, vector illustration influence, clean lines, high contrast, perfect for screen printing.
negative: blur, low resolution, grain, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, messy, messy details, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, realistic photo, photorealism, logo, trademark, copyrighted, text in sky
